items.question: How do I create an account?
items.answer: Simply click 'Sign Up', enter your email, password, and confirm the OTP sent to your email. You can then log in and start shopping.

items.question: What should I do if I forget my password?
items.answer: Select 'Forgot Password' on the login screen, enter your email address to receive a link to reset your password.

items.question: Can I change the email address associated with my account?
items.answer: For security reasons, you cannot directly change the email address yourself. Please contact Customer Support with your old and new email addresses for assistance.

items.question: Is my personal information secure?
items.answer: Yes, we use advanced encryption and security measures to protect your personal data and ensure your privacy.

items.question: How can I place an order?
items.answer: Browse our products, add items to your cart, proceed to checkout, fill in your shipping details, and follow the instructions to complete the payment.

items.question: How long does shipping usually take?
items.answer: Standard shipping typically takes 3-7 business days, depending on your location. You can track your order using the link provided in your shipping confirmation email.

items.question: Can I cancel or modify my order after placing it?
items.answer: You can cancel or modify your order within 1 hour of placement. After this time, the order processing begins, and changes may not be possible. Please contact support immediately.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number and a link to monitor its progress.

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: We accept various payment methods. You can pay securely through our partner PayOS by scanning the QR code or saving the image to pay via your preferred e-wallet/banking app.

items.question: Is the payment process secure?
items.answer: Yes, all transactions are processed securely through our payment partner, PayOS, which complies with the highest industry security standards to protect your financial information.

items.question: What is your return policy?
items.answer: We accept returns for unused items in their original packaging within 14 days of delivery. Please review our full 'Returns Policy' page for detailed conditions and instructions.

items.question: How do I initiate a return?
items.answer: Log in to your account, go to 'Order History', select the order, and follow the steps to submit a return request. You will receive instructions on how to ship the item back.

items.question: Do your products come with a warranty?
items.answer: Most of our products come with a manufacturer's warranty. The specific warranty period is mentioned on the product page. Please keep your proof of purchase.

items.question: How can I comment on a blog post?
items.answer: You can leave a comment on any blog post after logging into your account. We encourage constructive discussions and community exchange.

items.question: Can I share a blog post with my friends?
items.answer: Yes, each blog post has dedicated share buttons for various social media platforms, making it easy for you to share content with your network.

items.question: How often is the blog updated?
items.answer: We aim to publish new and engaging content weekly. Subscribe to our newsletter to get the latest updates directly in your inbox.
